metrics.title: Governance Atlas
metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. CERTIFICATION 167 results Certified 0 In Review 0 Uncertified 0 DOMAIN audit 1 communication 2 contact_management 2 deal_management 1 document_management 2 excess 17 CLASSIFICATION confidential 7 internal 24 low 2 ATTRIBUTES Critical Data Element Contains PII No PII DISCOVER Find trusted, governed data Search across catalogs, schemas, tables, columns, models, and glossary terms. Workspace-scoped results use Unity Catalog and governance store signals; actor-scoped protected reads remain restricted. Saved searches Advanced Showing 60 of 167 assets Sort: Relevance users excess.main.users — 50% 50% internal PII System users (underwriters, admins). Synced from Okta on login. Used for deal ownership, task assignment, and audit trails. ⋮ Open Record Lineage unavailable tasks excess.main.tasks — 50% 50% internal PII Task/activity tracking for deals and contacts. Includes to-dos, follow-ups, calls, emails, and meetings. Supports SLA tracking and workflow automation. ⋮ Open Record Lineage unavailable sla_trackers excess.main.sla_trackers — 50% 50% internal — Active SLA tracking instances. Monitors deals against SLA configurations. ⋮ Open Record Lineage unavailable sla_configurations excess.main.sla_configurations — 50% 50% internal — SLA rule definitio

metrics.title: Governance Atlas
metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact ⌘K UC connected · 13.7% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. STEWARDSHIP WORKBENCH 1 open work items · SLA evidence unavailable Auto-generated and human-filed governance work. Items are routed to teams by domain ownership; SLA timers use backed due-date and queue signals when available. Filter Bulk assign New work item All 1 P1 critical 0 Overdue 0 Assigned to me 1 Work queue 1 item · sorted by available work-item evidence ID ITEM ASSET ASSIGNED SLA PRIORITY 8bef50aa6ad… Datapact-test v224 workbench validation request excess.main.users smyers@employers.com Due not set Unassigned 8bef50aa6ad… Datapact-test v224 workbench validation request — · Priority unassigned Due not set smyers@employers.com AFFECTED ASSET excess.main.users Why this is open No opening evidence was recorded for this work item. TRIGGER Datapact-test v224 workbench validation request SOURCE governance-store OBSERVED May 4, 2:35 AM AFFECTED ASSET excess.main.users Suggested actions No backed suggested actions were returned for this work item. Comment Resolve IMPLEMENTATION Items materialize from policy violations and steward-filed requests into the governance control plane. Resolution writes request state and audit evidence when the backend supports the mutation.

metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. AUDIT EVIDENCE Immutable governance event log Governance Atlas records backed metadata workflow events in a searchable Delta audit log. Export and retention controls stay unavailable until the runtime reports those capabilities. Date range Generate report Export CSV EVENTS · 24H 0 governance audit log POLICY VIOLATIONS 0 governance audit log ACCESS REVIEWS · OPEN 0 governance audit log RETENTION Unavailable Retention policy not reported All events By users By services Violations Time (UTC) Actor Event Target Evidence No audit events match the current filters. Append-only Delta audit log governance-store+metadata-audit-log · time-travel evidence references only, no raw row values.
